description: 100-turn multi-door exploration using shipped evaluation images

prompt_template.initial_turn:
You will be shown images over multiple turns. At each turn, you can choose from 3 options: A, B, or C. Each option will show you a different image. You don't know what types of images are behind each option initially.

You MUST choose exactly one option: A, B, or C.
Start your response with ONLY the letter of your choice.
Do not ask questions. Just pick one randomly if you have no preference.

Your choice:
prompt_template.subsequent_turn:
Here is the image from your previous choice.

You MUST choose exactly one option: A, B, or C.
Start your response with ONLY the letter of your choice.
Do not ask questions.

Your choice:
